3012800.name: Leglakh: Prologue
3012800.description:
Leglakh Prologue is a single player tribute to Tom Proudfoots 1994 classic Nahlakh. Form your party of eight champions from knights, archers, mages,
and clerics. Fight against hordes of various enemies to gather what is needed to defeat the prime demon Leglakh.

Leglakh has awoken, and with the awakening the previously timid animals have become hostile, and some of them have started to bleed green blood. Tribes of kobolds, orcs and hobgoblins are on the warpath, and even dragons have been spotted circling the skies. The combat happens in real time via a programmable autobattler, where you customise the ai of your champions for offensive and defensive.

Leglakh Prologue only contains one island and a simplified ai setup, but the full game will include more classes, an inventory system, character development and huge continents to discover and dungeons to raid.
3012800.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
